qna_pairs.Query: What type of cuisine is Sindhi Raitha?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: Sindhi Raitha is a South Asian cuisine dish.

qna_pairs.Query: What ingredients are required to make Sindhi Raitha?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: Sindhi Raitha requires curd (thick plain "natural" yogurt), finely-chopped onion, green chiles, chopped tomatoes, amchoor (dry mango powder), and salt to taste.
Sindhi Raitha can be prepared by combining all the ingredients together and serving it cool.
